title: Types of angles by measure
description: Relate acute, obtuse, right, and straight angles to angle measures in degrees.

assessment_items.question_content:
$∠ ABC$ measures $135^\circ$. 

**What type of angle is it?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Acute angle

An acute angle is an angle that is greater than $0^\circ$ but less than $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Obtuse angle

An obtuse angle is an angle that is greater than $90^\circ$ but less than $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Right angle

A right angle is an angle that measures exactly  $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Straight angle

A straight angle is an angle that measures exactly $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

$135^\circ$ is between $90^\circ$ and $180^\circ$, so $∠ ABC$  is an **obtuse** angle.

###Acute angle

###Obtuse angle

###Right angle

###Straight angle

A straight angle is an angle that measures exactly $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

$179^\circ$ is between $90^\circ$ and $180^\circ$, so $∠ XYZ$  is an **obtuse** angle.

assessment_items.question_content:
$∠ PQR$ measures $28^\circ$. 

**What type of angle is it?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Acute angle

An acute angle is an angle that is greater than $0^\circ$ but less than $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Obtuse angle

An obtuse angle is an angle that is greater than $90^\circ$ but less than $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]


###Right angle

A right angle is an angle that measures exactly  $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]


###Straight angle

A straight angle is an angle that measures exactly $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

$28^\circ$ is between $0^\circ$ and $90^\circ$, so $∠ PQR$ is an **acute** angle.

assessment_items.question_content:
$∠ DEF$ measures $90^\circ$. 

**What type of angle is it?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Acute angle

An acute angle is an angle that is greater than $0^\circ$ but less than $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Obtuse angle

An obtuse angle is an angle that is greater than $90^\circ$ but less than $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Right angle

A right angle is an angle that measures exactly  $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Straight angle

A straight angle is an angle that measures exactly $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

$90^\circ$ is exactly $90^\circ$, so $∠ DEF$ is a **right** angle.

assessment_items.question_content:

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Acute angle

An acute angle is an angle that is greater than $0^\circ$ but less than $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Obtuse angle

An obtuse angle is an angle that is greater than $90^\circ$ but less than $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

###Right angle

A right angle is an angle that measures exactly  $90^\circ$.

###Straight angle

A straight angle is an angle that measures exactly $180^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]

$180^\circ$ is exactly $180^\circ$, so $∠ JKL$ is a **straight** angle.

assessment_items.question_content:
$∠ MNO$ is an acute angle.

**Which of the following could be its measure?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
###Acute angle

An acute angle is an angle that is greater than $0^\circ$ but less than $90^\circ$.

[[☃ image 1]]
Which of the angles are between $0^\circ$ and $90^\circ$?
$29^\circ$ could be the measure of $∠ MNO$.
